name: github_set_enterprise_copilot_coding_agent_policy
description: Set the Copilot cloud agent policy for an enterprise (PUT /enterprises/{enterprise}/copilot/policies/coding_agent). policy_state required: enabled_for_all_orgs, disabled_for_all_orgs, enabled_for_selected_orgs, or configured_by_org_admins.
